meaning: n.尺寸,量度器,量度标准,方法,测量,措施vt.测量,测度,估量,分派,权衡,调节vi.量
examples: The Richter Scale is a measure of ground motion.
It's got four beats to a measure.
The measure would end the common practice of re-registering banks under a new name.
Parliamentarians have tried to introduce a measure specifically designed to allow the Rodney case to proceed.
